texts.t002: Swing and sliding gate automation for villas, societies and industry — a 21-model swing motor line-up, sliding motors up to multi-tonne gates, cantilever and telescopic systems with full safety accessories.
texts.t012: 21 models of articulated-arm and linear ram operators for leaves from 1.5 m to heavy estate gates.
texts.t013: Rack-and-pinion operators for gates from 400 kg to multi-tonne industrial sliders, with magnetic limits.
texts.t014: Trackless cantilever and space-saving telescopic gates fabricated and automated in-house.
texts.t015: Photocells, flashing lamps, loop detectors, GSM/Wi-Fi modules, keypads and long-range UHF readers.
texts.t016: Which is better for my gate — swing or sliding?
texts.t017: Do gate motors work during power failure?
texts.t018: If your driveway has depth for leaves to swing and slope is minimal, swing looks classic; sliding suits sloped drives, wide openings and limited swing space. We survey free of cost before recommending.
texts.t019: All operators include key-release manual override; battery backup and solar kits are available.
texts.t027: GI, aluminium, polycarbonate & India's only 100% Indian-make full-length transparent shutter.
texts.t028: Rapid roll PVC doors up to 100 RPM-class SIE40–SIE100 motors for hygiene, logistics and cold chain.
texts.t029: Insulated overhead sectional doors, stacking doors and residential garage automation with SIE16/36 openers.
texts.t030: Get a same-day recommendation for automatic gates
texts.t031: Share your opening size and a photo — our Mumbai engineering desk replies with the right system and budget.
